repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Gay male pornographic 8mm films; packages depict and characterize the sale of such material.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Gay male pornographic 8mm films; packages depict and characterize the sale of such material.

emph.ref: Series I. Reel to Reel Films

userestrict.head: Restrictions on Use:
userestrict.p: Mold present inside video tapes in Box 9. May also be present in Boxes 4-8. Individuals with weak immune systems may need to take extra precautions.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Gay male pornographic movies, #7637. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Archival copies not to be played.
